sizing_rule.note: Use parametric optimal f when outcomes are Normally or Lognormally distributed (percentage changes). Use Kelly formula only for Bernoulli distributions (exactly 2 outcomes). Optimal f = f(distribution_type, win_percentage, payoff_ratio).

source_rule_text: Use parametric optimal f based on the distribution of outcomes (Lognormal or Normal) to determine position size, with Kelly formula applicable only when outcomes follow a Bernoulli distribution with two possible outcomes.
